# Herin Yudha Pratama

> Full-stack engineer & systems architect in Bandung, Indonesia. Fourteen years on the business side — founder, commercial lead, head of commercial — now designing and building business-critical software for operations, commerce, and AI automation.

herin.id is his personal site: profile, live product demos, and ways to work together.

## About

- Fourteen years operating businesses before building software professionally: founded AS GOOD SUPPLY CO (2012–2021) and ran it for nearly a decade, then led commercial orgs at consumer brands — offline stores, online store & marketplace, digital marketing, CRM, KOL, and content teams.
- Performance marketing is home ground: over a million dollars deployed across Meta, Google, TikTok, and Shopee ads at a 15–20× average ROAS.
- Today he builds operational software: ERP and accounting platforms, WhatsApp commerce, dashboards, and AI agents that work around the clock. Approach: understand the business flow first, then write the code. The tools change; the goal doesn't: systems that quietly do their job every day.

## Services

- AI Automation & Agent Orchestration: multi-agent AI systems that can weigh a decision, not just follow rules — running around the clock, monitored, and accountable.
- Full-Stack App Development: web apps, dashboards, and internal tools built end-to-end — from database and architecture to production and monitoring.
- ERP & Accounting Systems: from transaction records to a ledger that balances. Systems that follow the business flow, not the other way around.
- WhatsApp Commerce & AI Chatbots: selling and serving customers where they already are — with agents that know their limits.
- Performance Marketing & Ads: Meta, Google, TikTok, and Shopee ads — over a million dollars managed at a 15–20× average ROAS.
- Dashboards & Analytics: numbers from many sources, unified and presented so they're fast to read — and right.

## Experience

- Founder — MAJI (2023–now, Bandung)
- Head of Commercial — Paddy Indonesia (2024–2026, Bandung): led the full commercial org — offline stores, online store & marketplace, digital marketing, CRM, KOL, and content teams.
- Marketing Manager — PORTEE (2023–2024, Bandung)
- Commercial Lead & Digital Marketing Manager — Visval (2021–2022, Bandung)
- Founder — AS GOOD SUPPLY CO (2012–2021, Bandung)

## Live demos

- [ERP & Accounting demo](https://herin.id/#erp): live double-entry ERP with safe dummy data — sales, purchasing, and inventory flowing straight into stock movement and accounting records: journal posting, AR/AP, cash and bank, general ledger, P&L, and management dashboards. Direct: https://erp.herin.id
- [WhatsApp Commerce demo](https://herin.id/#wa): unified WhatsApp inbox with customer context and AI-to-human handoff, broadcasts (restock alerts, cart recovery, VIP drops, segmentation, scheduling), and commerce analytics.

Both demos are real software running in production infrastructure, isolated with safe dummy data.
